first_run.rationale: The two evaluations are functionally identical. The scores are the same, and the articulated strengths and concerns are substantively unchanged, focusing on the same technical skills and gaps (AI work, testing culture, lack of Nest.js/Kotlin/Python). The minor differences in wording and framing are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any change in reasoning based on the candidate's location.
